tuning: E A D G B E
content:
We Didn't Start The Fire chords
Billy Joel  1989  **

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/We_Didn%27t_Start_the_Fire

[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch] * [ch]C[/ch]  x4

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]
Harry Truman, Doris Day, Red China, Johnnie Ray[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch] *                             [ch]C[/ch]
South Pacific, Walter Winchell, Joe DiMaggio[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                            [ch]D[/ch]
Joe McCarthy, Richard Nixon, Studebaker, television[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch] *                      [ch]C[/ch]
North Korea, South Korea, Marilyn Monroe[/tab]

[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
We didn't start the fire;[/tab]

We didn't start the fire[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]
No we didn't light it,[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
We didn't start the fire[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]

[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
We didn't start the fire[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]
It was always burning,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]
Since the world's been turning[/tab]

We didn't start the fire[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]
But when we are gone[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]

*  It has been suggested that Em sounds better than Am

** Alternates:

Capo III

[ch]G[/ch]  = [ch]E[/ch]
[ch]D[/ch]  = [ch]B[/ch]
[ch]Am[/ch] = [ch]F#m[/ch]
[ch]C[/ch]  = [ch]A[/ch]

Open (These chords are not in the original key)

[ch]G[/ch]  = [ch]C[/ch]
[ch]D[/ch]  = [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]Am[/ch] = [ch]Dm[/ch]
[ch]C[/ch]  = [ch]F[/ch]

Open (These chords are not in the original key)

[ch]G[/ch]  = [ch]A[/ch]
[ch]D[/ch]  = [ch]E[/ch]
[ch]Am[/ch] = [ch]Bm[/ch]
[ch]C[/ch]  = [ch]D[/ch]

Set8
